summary: protojson.Unmarshal infinite loop when unmarshaling certain forms of invalid JSON
description: The `protojson.Unmarshal` function can enter an infinite loop when unmarshaling certain forms of invalid JSON. This bug affects `google.golang.org/protobuf/encoding/protojson` and is reachable whenever attacker-controlled JSON reaches the unmarshaler. Affected file `encoding/protojson/decode.go`. Only triggers when the environment variable `GODEBUG=protojson=1` is set.
